actions_taken: HOLD — overrides block remains empty. Override count 0 unchanged. No tighten, no loosen.

Nothing to loosen: every lever is already at base (the floor); the 2026-05-05 16:00 EOD strategy_review explicitly emptied the overrides block on the thesis that the override stack had become rationalized inaction, and that thesis remains unrefuted in the ~20 hours since. Today's 5-BUY burst, the CHOLAHLDNG→COFORGE rotation, the 4 strategic exits, and the SOBHA→GRSE redeployment have all cleared base-config gates cleanly.

Nothing to tighten on the GRSE addition: 4.85% slot, mid-band sizing, redeploys the SOBHA-vacated slot into a fresh second-name in the Defense bucket. The emergent Defense cluster at 9.89% (n=2) has 25.11 pp of headroom to a 35%-style sector cap — this is constructive diversification within an under-utilized bucket, not concentration. Tightening max_position_pct or sector caps on a 9.89% emergent cluster would be punishing the strategy for legitimate bucket-deepening.

Nothing to tighten on portfolio shape: every lever has comfortable buffer to base — BFSI 17.89% vs 35% (17.11 pp), max position 8.23% vs 20% (11.77 pp), filled deployment 64.71% vs 80% (15.29 pp; 72.72% projection still 7.28 pp under), daily loss -0.31% vs 3% (89.8% of buffer remaining). Position sizing band 3.78%-8.23% is healthy. Composite distress 0/3.

Nothing to tighten on daily P&L: unchanged at -₹3,072.77 (-0.31%, 10.2% utilization). No new closes between 11:30 and 12:00. Tightening daily_loss_limit_pct on flat utilization is reactionary and would block legitimate signal.

HFCL non-fill at 104 min is explicitly outside risk-config scope: risk-config arbitrates portfolio shape and gate calibration, not order fill/cancel decisions. The order represents committed but unfilled cash; the strategy/execution layer must decide whether to cancel, reprice, or wait. No risk-config lever is the right tool here.

Pre-armed watch items for 12:30: (a) HFCL fill resolution (104+ min OPEN — at this duration, strategy-layer cancel-or-fill decision is overdue; risk-config still HOLDs); (b) any 3rd Defense name OR 4th BFSI name admit → reassess sector cluster posture (Defense currently 9.89% vs ~35% reference cap, BFSI 17.89% vs ~35%); (c) any new realized loss bringing daily P&L to -1.0% (~-₹10k) → reassess loss-gate posture; (d) any new admit at conf <0.55 — empirically the conf floor remains non-binding.
